title: Snowbee Diamond 2#6 4-Piece Fly Rod
features: Latest Tri-Modulus Carbon Fibre design technology, providing 4-piece blanks finished in lustrous olive green colour
Lightweight, up-locking anodized aluminium 'Diamond design' reel seat, with Burl wood inserts
SiC lined stripper rings, high-lift snakes and oversize tip rings for effortless casting performance
High quality AAA grade cork handles
description: Since 1994 the name 'Diamond Fly' has been synonymous with Snowbee and has built a loyal following amongst fly fishers. Since then, the Diamond range has steadily evolved and now our top-selling Diamond2 range incorporates the very latest thinking in fly rod design and material technology. The rods retain the same crisp, middle-to-tip action of their predecessors and still represent exceptional value for money for a rod of this quality. Using our well-tried 'Tri-modulus carbon' technology produces a blank that is fast and light. These rods compete on performance with the market leaders, but are infinitely more affordable. Using the finest quality materials available we spared nothing in producing the best looking, best fishing 4-piece fly rods we could achieve at this price. The range has been designed with a particular fishing application in mind. In addition to river, small Stillwater and reservoir rods, we also have longer lower line weight models, appealing to river fishers who favor the lighter Eastern European and Czech nymph styles of fishing. Finished in a lustrous deep olive color, with self color whippings, subtle gold graphics and brushed aluminium reel seats, with olive green burl wood insert complementing the color of the blanks. Combine all of these and you have a rod with timeless appeal. Every rod comes with matching cotton-drill rod bag and a strong Cordura covered rod tube embossed with our leather 'fly' logo.
